body.title: pe: Seed IMPLEMENT + TEST nodes — apply edit + run tests
body.result: IMPLEMENT applies hypothesis edit (single replace, skips on no/invalid hypothesis). TEST calls run_tests() or fallback pytest subprocess. Both pure tool steps, no LLM. 10 new tests (71 total).
body.description: IMPLEMENT: pure tool call — apply basket[hypothesis] via Edit(file, old_string, new_string). TEST: run_tests() → basket[test_result]. No LLM in either node. Tests: edit applied correctly, test_result populated.
